children.text: furnish the Secretary, upon request, information with respect to the process for licensing or other authorization for institutions of higher education to operate within the State;
notify the Secretary promptly whenever the State revokes a license or other authority to operate an institution of higher education; and

children.label: A
children.text: has committed fraud in the administration of the student assistance programs authorized by this subchapter; or

children.label: B
children.text: has substantially violated a provision of this subchapter.

children.heading: Institutional responsibility
children.label: b Institutional responsibility
children.text: Each institution of higher education shall provide evidence to the Secretary that the institution has authority to operate within a State at the time the institution is certified under subpart 3 of this part.
